counterCase: The uncertainty surrounding the starters' handedness limits the ability to form a clear lean.
watchFor: Any announcements regarding the handedness of the starters or lineup changes.
whatWouldChangeTheRead: Details on lineup performance leading up to the game
summary: Both teams have young starters with unknown handedness advantages. Without additional context on their recent performance or lineup matchups, the signals do not favor either side.
lean: No clear lean based on the current signal picture.

detect: The handedness of both starters is unknown, creating uncertainty.
perceive.frame: The matchup features the Pirates visiting the Athletics with both starters unconfirmed.
aim: Understanding the handedness advantage is crucial for evaluating this game.

interrogate.question: The uncertainty around the starters' handedness makes it difficult to lean toward either team.
interrogate.verify: Both teams' lineups and recent performance data are missing, adding to the uncertainty.

discern.weigh: Starting pitching information is available, but lineup and performance data are missing.
discern.stress: The lack of clarity on handedness and lineup performance could undermine the read.

decide.resolve: Hold off on making any conclusions until more information on the starters and lineups is available.
decide.justify: Confidence is low due to the uncertainty surrounding the starters' handedness.
